values: Note: Keep the industries intentionally broad. Based on our testing over the past 12 months, proprietary outreach to highly specific verticals has not been effective for several reasons. As a result, we have shifted all of our search clients to this broader approach, with strong success.

Asset-light manufacturing companies design, engineer, and commercialize physical products without owning or operating large-scale manufacturing facilities. These businesses focus on product development, intellectual property, supply chain coordination, quality control, branding, and go-to-market execution, while outsourcing production to third-party contract manufacturers.

They typically operate with lower capital intensity, flexible production capacity, and the ability to scale across geographies and end markets by leveraging global manufacturing partners.

Infrastructure and industrial services companies support the construction, operation, maintenance, and optimization of physical assets and critical infrastructure. These businesses provide specialized services, inspections, monitoring, and project-based support without owning the underlying infrastructure assets.

Mature vertical B2B SaaS companies with 5+ years of operating history, $3-10M ARR, profitable (open to smaller — adjustments often reveal more EBITDA), 20%+ annual growth, and mission-critical workflow software. Target profile: founder-owned or bootstrapped, NOT venture-backed or PE-backed, 85%+ gross revenue retention. Industry-specific platforms with high switching costs, deeply embedded in customer operations, subscription-based recurring revenue. B2B ONLY — no consumer-facing / B2C software. AI-enhanceable, not AI-disruptable.
